entries.name: Attack
entries.summary: The Attack skill determines accuracy in melee combat.

preview.excerpt: Attack is a melee combat skill which determines the accuracy of a player's attacks when using melee weapons. Higher Attack allows the use of stronger weapons.

entries.name: Strength
entries.summary: Strength increases the maximum melee damage a player can deal.

preview.excerpt: Strength is a melee combat skill that determines the amount of damage a player can inflict in combat. Higher Strength levels allow players to deal more damage per hit.

entries.name: Defence
entries.summary: Defence reduces the chance of being hit by opponents.

preview.excerpt: Defence is a melee combat skill that decreases the likelihood of an opponent successfully landing a hit on a player. Higher Defence allows use of stronger armour.

entries.name: Ranged
entries.summary: Ranged allows combat from a distance using projectiles.

preview.excerpt: Ranged is a combat skill that allows players to attack from a distance using bows, crossbows, and thrown weapons. It is one of the three combat styles.
Magic is one of the most versatile skills in the game, used for combat, teleportation, enchanting, and alchemy. Spells require runes to cast.

entries.name: Prayer
entries.summary: Prayer grants temporary combat boosts and protection.

preview.excerpt: Prayer is a skill that can be trained by burying bones or offering them at the altar in Edgeville Monastery. Active prayers drain prayer points over time.
Melee combat uses Attack, Strength, and Defence skills. Weapon choice, combat style, and enemy weaknesses all affect damage and accuracy.

entries.name: Bosses
entries.summary: List of boss monsters and their mechanics.

preview.excerpt: Bosses are powerful monsters that typically require high combat stats and specific strategies to defeat. They drop valuable and unique items.

entries.name: Weapons
entries.summary: Weapons available in Old School RuneScape.

preview.excerpt: Weapons vary by attack style, speed, and level requirement. Melee weapons include swords and axes; ranged weapons include bows and crossbows.

entries.name: Armour
entries.summary: Armour sets and their defensive stats.

preview.excerpt: Armour provides defensive bonuses against melee, ranged, and magic attacks. Sets are typically unlocked at specific Defence levels.

entries.name: Runes
entries.summary: Runes used for casting Magic spells.

preview.excerpt: Runes are small, magical stones used to cast spells. They can be purchased from magic shops, crafted via Runecraft, or obtained as drops.

stats.label: Types
stats.value: Air, Water, Earth, Fire, Mind, Body, Cosmic, Chaos, Nature, Law, Death, Blood, Soul
